diversity_basis.citation: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 311.1 — engineer-declared sub-feeder; diversity computed at downstream board

selectivity_results.code_clause: KS 1700:2018 § 536 (route to BS 7671 via §313) + BS EN 60898-1:2019 — 100A main-switch-fused incomer provides fuse-to-MCB selectivity against all final-circuit MCBs (≤40A), well above the 2:1 IEC 60898 same-curve cascade threshold (worst-case ratio 100:40 = 2.5:1, typical 100:10 = 10:1). 10 kA Icn on the MCBs exceeds the 9.8 kA declared PFC at the KPLC intake. Fuse-to-MCB cascades are inherently selective at the high-fault end due to the fuse's I²t characteristic, so engineer-declared verdict is firm without a manufacturer cascade-table lookup.

non_compliance_flags.message: Neutral current 17.8 A is 30.8% of the largest phase (L2 = 57.8 A). Per KS 1700:2018 § 524 (route to BS 7671): single-phase load distribution best practice — rebalance recommended. Re-allocate one or more circuits between phases to reduce neutral loading and improve voltage symmetry.
non_compliance_flags.code_clause: IEC 60364-5-52:2009 § 524.2.2 + KS 1700:2018 § 524 / IET OSG Appendix A (load balancing best practice)

assumptions: KPLC declared PFC of 9.8kA at intake; MCBs selected with 10kA Icn (BS EN 60898).
KS 1700 §411.3.3 universal socket-RCD policy applied to all socket-bearing circuits (C03, C04, C08).
Compressor C07 uses Type D MCB + 100mA RCD (motor inrush + leakage tolerance).
Submain C08 (60m run) requires 30mA RCBO at downstream gate-house DB; selected at MSP-100 to centralize protection.

drawing_notes: MSP-100 located in main switchroom adjacent to KPLC intake position.
IP55 enclosure rating for industrial environment.
All ways labelled per BS EN 61439 marking requirements (adopted by KS 1700).

rationale.chat_summary: MSP-100: 100A TPN industrial main switchpanel for a Nairobi light-engineering workshop, 8 circuits (workshop + office lighting + sockets + 3-ph machines + 7.5kW compressor + 60m submain to gate house), fed direct from KPLC 11kV/415V substation. BS EN 61439 TTA enclosure IP55 for industrial environment. KS 1700:2018 §411.3.3 socket-RCD on C03/C04/C08; Type D + 100mA RCD on compressor (motor inrush + leakage). Cascade to MCBs verified — 100A fuse-to-MCB ratio inherently selective at 9.8 kA PFC.

sections.title: Board Identification
sections.summary: MSP-100 is the industrial main switchpanel for the Nairobi light-engineering workshop, located in the main switchroom adjacent to the KPLC intake on the ground floor. Built as a BS EN 61439 Type-Tested Assembly with IP55 rating for tropical industrial environment (dust + occasional water jet exposure during cleaning). Role flagged as `industrial_main_switchpanel` so downstream consumers recognise the industrial-feeder character even though the `specialty_board` discriminator is used (the schedule does not currently emit `ways_total/used/spare` accounting that the `main_switchboard` branch would require).

decisions.label: Board role flagged as industrial_main_switchpanel
decisions.summary: Signals industrial main-feeder function to downstream skills (SLD, riser, cable-containment, earthing) including motor-circuit segregation expectations.

decisions.label: BS EN 61439 TTA enclosure, IP55
decisions.summary: Type-Tested Assembly construction with IP55 protects against industrial dust ingress and occasional cleaning-water jets — standard Kenyan industrial-switchroom specification.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 100A TPN+E intake at 415V fed direct from the KPLC 11kV/415V substation via Wayleave KPLC-NRB-IND-2143. KPLC declared the prospective fault current at the intake as 9.8 kA. Main incomer is a 100A main-switch-fused device with 25 kA breaking capacity — comfortably exceeds the declared PFC and gives 15 kA margin for future KPLC network reinforcement. TPN+E phase arrangement provides the four-conductor + earth topology Kenyan industrial premises adopt by KPLC convention.

decisions.label: 100A TPN+E intake direct from KPLC 11/0.415kV substation
decisions.summary: Workshop demand at ~30 kVA diversified + headroom for the gate-house submain and 7.5kW compressor — 100A intake sized for ~28% spare capacity.
decisions.rule: Intake sizing from maximum demand + diversity
decisions.code_clause: KS 1700:2018 § 311 (route to BS 7671 § 311.1) + IET OSG App A

decisions.label: Declared PFC 9.8 kA at KPLC intake
decisions.summary: KPLC-declared value — main switch 25 kA breaking capacity and final-circuit MCBs at 10 kA Icn both clear the threshold.

decisions.label: Main switch type: main_switch_fused
decisions.summary: Fused incomer combines isolation with HRC-fuse short-circuit interruption; common KPLC industrial-intake configuration and inherently selective with downstream MCBs.

sections.title: Circuit Breakdown
sections.summary: 8 final circuits: workshop and office lighting (C01, C02 — Type B no RCD), socket ring + radials (C03, C04 — Type B + 30mA Type A RCD per socket-RCD policy), 3-ph lathe and pillar drill (C05, C06 — Type C no RCD for fixed industrial machinery), 7.5kW 3-ph compressor (C07 — Type D + 100mA Type A RCD for motor inrush and leakage tolerance), and 40A submain to gate-house DB (C08 — Type B + 30mA Type A RCD on the submain). Diversity not applied at MSP-100; the gate-house submain has its own diversity applied at the downstream board.

decisions.label: Type D + 100mA RCD on compressor C07
decisions.summary: Compressor motor has high starting inrush (≥10×In) — Type D handles inrush without nuisance trip; 100mA RCD tolerates legitimate motor leakage while still providing fire/earth-fault protection.
decisions.rule: Motor-circuit MCB curve + RCD sensitivity selection

decisions.label: Type C on 3-ph machine tools C05, C06
decisions.summary: Lathe (5.5kW) and pillar drill (2.2kW) — moderate motor inrush handled by Type C; no RCD because fixed industrial machinery is outside the §411.3.3 socket-RCD scope.

decisions.label: 30mA Type A RCD on socket circuits (C03, C04) and submain (C08)
decisions.summary: KS 1700:2018 §411.3.3 universal socket-RCD policy on C03 (workshop ring) and C04 (office radials); 30mA Type A on C08 centralises gate-house submain protection at MSP-100.

sections.title: Selectivity Analysis
sections.summary: Upstream device is the 100A main-switch-fused incomer; downstream final circuits are 6-40A MCBs. Worst-case ratio at C08 (40A) = 100:40 = 2.5:1, comfortably above the 2:1 IEC 60898 same-curve cascade threshold; typical lighting-MCB ratios sit at 10:1 or higher. Fuse-to-MCB cascades are inherently selective at the high-fault end because the fuse I²t lets the downstream MCB clear faults entirely before the fuse element melts. 10 kA Icn on the MCBs exceeds the 9.8 kA declared PFC at the intake — no cascade backup required. Engineer-declared verdict, no tool-call-pending.

decisions.label: Fuse-to-MCB cascade inherently selective at 9.8 kA
decisions.summary: 100A HRC fuse I²t characteristic permits downstream MCB (10-40A) to clear local faults entirely before fuse element melts; ratio 2.5:1 worst-case sits well above same-curve threshold.

decisions.label: 10 kA Icn on all MCBs covers 9.8 kA declared PFC
decisions.summary: MCB rated short-circuit capacity exceeds the declared fault level at the intake — no cascade backup required.

sections.title: Compliance Assessment
sections.summary: MSP-100 compliant against KS 1700:2018 (the Kenyan adoption of the IET Wiring Regulations; §313 establishes equivalence to BS 7671:2018), BS EN 61439-1:2020 (TTA assembly construction), BS EN 60898-1:2019 (MCBs), and KPLC supply-intake conventions for industrial premises. No CRITICAL or HIGH flags. Citations follow the KE dual-routing form: KS 1700 clause + `(route to BS 7671 via §313)` qualifier — KS 1700 §313 is the formal equivalence anchor.

decisions.label: KS 1700:2018 + BS 7671 dual-routing citation discipline
decisions.summary: Every protection-related clause cites KS 1700 first with `(route to BS 7671 via §313)` qualifier; non-protection clauses cite the BS EN / IEC source directly per KE convention.

decisions.label: BS EN 61439 TTA enclosure construction
decisions.summary: Type-Tested Assembly built and verified per BS EN 61439-1:2020 — Kenyan industrial-switchpanel default specification adopted by KS 1700.

sections.title: Schedule Notes
sections.summary: Schedule emitted as 8-row table with 4 spare ways for industrial expansion (additional machine tools, dust extraction, welding bay). Note: this board functions as the industrial main switchpanel for the workshop but is classified as `specialty_board` in the IR rather than `main_switchboard` because the schedule does not currently emit the `ways_total/used/spare` accounting that the main_switchboard discriminator branch requires — this reflects schema-shape pragmatism, not engineering hierarchy. Tropical industrial environment derating is implicit in the IP55 rating and the 10 kA Icn margin; no per-circuit ambient derating applied because the switchroom is mechanically ventilated.

decisions.label: specialty_board classification despite main-switchpanel function
decisions.summary: Board functions as industrial main switchpanel; specialty_board classification reflects IR schema-shape pragmatism (no ways_total/used/spare accounting emitted), not engineering hierarchy — role field carries the functional designation.

decisions.label: 4 spare ways reserved (W9-W12)
decisions.summary: Industrial-expansion provision: additional machine tools, dust-extraction blower, welding bay, or compressor-room sub-feed.

invariants.evidence: INV-14 board MSP-100 (KE → BS): R1 jurisdiction→format mapping (GB/KE → BS 7671 §514) holds; R2 board_label.text+svg populated, no {{}} remnants; R3 board_label.text matches BS format regex; R4 8/8 circuits carry circuit_label.text+svg, no {{}} remnants; R5 every circuit_label.text matches BS circuit regex; R6 tool_call_pending booleans set on all labels.

INV-15 board MSP-100 (KE): all 8 circuits carry diversity_basis with valid load_type enum + factor_applied in [0.0, 1.0] (Rule 1 PASS). All citations >=20 chars with recognisable clause markers (Reg / § / OSG / Table / CoP / TM) (Rule 2 PASS). Rule 3 N/A (no lift or ev_charger circuits on this board). method_params present where method='largest_plus_remainder_pct' (Rule 4 PASS).
